datasets.description: QASPER reformatted for RAG evaluation. Derived from Dasigi et al. 2021 (NAACL, 577 citations). Contains corpus chunks with section_name, queries, relevance judgments (qrels), and gold answers.
datasets.suitability: Directly supports section-level retrieval: corpus has section_name per chunk; qrels map queries to evidence chunks enabling precise retrieval evaluation; gold answers allow F1 scoring. Use dev split (890 queries, 1913 qrels) for benchmarking.

datasets.description: QASPER QA pairs with full passage context. Each row has a question paired with a candidate section text and binary label (relevant/not). 2567 train / 1726 val / 1399 test rows.
datasets.provenance: Derived from allenai/qasper (Dasigi et al. 2021, NAACL). 487 HF downloads.
datasets.suitability: Useful for answer F1 evaluation: input field has question + section text, output field has gold answer string. Complements primary dataset for end-to-end QA scoring.

selection_rationale: Both datasets are derived from QASPER (NAACL 2021, 577 citations), a gold-standard scientific QA benchmark over 1,585 NLP papers. The primary dataset (qasper-rag) provides the complete retrieval evaluation infrastructure: section-chunked corpus with section_name labels, information-seeking queries, relevance judgments, and gold answers — exactly matching the artifact plan's requirements for section-level retrieval benchmarking. The secondary dataset provides QA pair format for F1 scoring.
